name: EGC
description: The European Glider Community connects glider operators across European national programmes, supporting knowledge exchange, training, and coordination. EGC also provides tools for tracking glider deployments worldwide.

name: UG2
description: A community-based coalition aimed at bolstering scientific collaboration, information, and resource sharing for gliders.

name: OceanOPS
description: OceanGliders coordinates with OceanOPS, the operational centre for GOOS observing networks, through the OceanGliders Technical Coordinator. OceanOPS maintains the global registry of glider deployments and provides real-time network monitoring.
